understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' by navigating the grid while avoiding spikes ('u'/'v').
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT), followed by automatic gravity fall until landing on solid or hazard; CLICK removes breakable blocks ('x') to open paths; gravity direction (DOWN/UP) dictates fall; 2 attempts and 50 turns per level; UNDO reverts last action.
